name: @aipehub/example-workflow-architect
description: 工作流架构师 (ARCH-M8) — deterministic, host-free demo of the WorkflowAssistantAgent's three architect behaviors: author a workflow from plain language (with the depth instruction threaded into the prompt), explain an EXISTING workflow without regenerating it, and attach the pure DAG graph (the 工作流图片介绍) to both. A mock LLM keyed off markers makes every claim self-asserting with no key and no network.
